reviews.review_title: One of my favorites, still play it
reviews.review_description:
I love the game. I've been checking for updates. I know the creator was having medical issues and couldn't work on the game. Not sure what happened with that. Of course, their health is more important than anything. If things change, more updates would be amazing. I'd pay for new areas and updates. 
It's still fun as is. Thanks.
Very much love it so far, do wish it was multi player would love to play with my family. Also night is dark would love to be able to put lights and what not that glow

I really do like this game, but there are some things that are very frustrating. Once you place the house and lock it you should have to go into your menu to delete it. I don’t know how many times I’ve had the house exactly how I wanted an accidentally deleted the house and everything in it Also the attic and top floors of the houses you can’t move around or sometimes you can’t even get into them. You should be able to buy walls for the houses some with windows some without you should be able to choose what color they are and to change the color of all of your house details. ￼ you should be able to snap things￼ to a grid because it’s very frustrating and difficult to get things exactly straight and it should show you when you are in alignment with nearby items. There needs to be a refrigerator. The wardrobe does not match the kitchen set. there is a washer no dryer. You should be able to size different items because there’s nothing that fits on the shelves. you should be able to display collectibles. The controller settings should have it to where you can disable everything. there are a lot of times where I’m teleporting when I’m trying to move things and I’m not staying still it’s very difficult. There should be a place where you can buy your livestock. It’s not a Homestead without livestock and you only get whatever they give you on each level and I have yet to find out how to get more or to be able to feed the animals or take care of them in anyway. There needs to be more varieties of the things that you would grow on a Homestead, the different flowers and produce that you would use. You’re  off to a great start, but it definitely could use a lot more to be a game that I would want to play a lot. And when you create a new Homestead it should  just be saved as that one location and use the last updated one instead of listing it different ways because I’ve lost things that way too. Please keep updating this because the idea is great! oh, and there should be an option to keep the daytime on when you’re trying to develop things the constant wanting to turn nighttime is annoying. Especially since none of the lamps work and there’s no way to work in the dark.

Not as good as I thought it would be. But this is still a pretty good game (I got it on sale). You get the non stop tasks. The building I enjoyed the most. 

It gets so dark at night and I can't find a way to skip past it. You can just go to a different area or back home and the sun will be back up. The flashlight is not bright enough, it sucks (wouldn't buy that in real world)
Love this game. Kind of gets repetitive when you play it too much and have most things unlocked. Would love an update and new things added to the game.

developer_response.body: We just made a post about future updates here. https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/developer-post/917397776995809/

reviews.review_description:
I love this game. I like that they added a sandbox mode with plenty of money because  sometimes I just want to relax and create
I would love to see some terrain tools where you could walk up a hill etc


Great game!
It’ll be nice if it has multiplayer option for friends to play with

The only gripes I have are:
I really wish everything that is supposed to be a light (lampposts, candles, etc.) would actually light up. 
I hate trying to get everything lined up with walls and stuff like that. It would be great if there was a snap/grid feature that aligned the objects with the edges of other objects. 
It would be awesome if you could actually enter all the houses/buildings.
Additionally with the lighting. There are ceiling lights, but you are unable to attach them to ceilings. 
Other than those things I really enjoy the game! Hopefully there will be updates incoming!

I LOVED farm simulator on PS4… I guess I kind of expected the same-ish from this but I have to be honest, I’m not in love with this game. I played it once and it was a bit off-putting. Soooo… I doubt I’ll play again anytime soon. Shame, really.

I am a veteran with ptsd and I like most have my good and bad days, even on a bad day I can come into this game and just relax by enjoying the sites and casual play of hunting for things to find and pictures to take. I spotted a ufo at Indiana farm (typical stereotype) and accurate as I’m from there lol. But all jokes aside it’s great game to just relax to, no matter how your mental might be affected come on in and listen to nature while taking a casual walk. Have a great day everyone.

I played it and I love it! However, I remembered Bigfoot was probably in this, and I went to the campgrounds and couldn't find him at night. Is he at the campgrounds or at another place in game? Thanks!

It’s so much fun! There are a few minor glitches but nothing major. I look forward to updates & upgrades in the future. I’m hoping that at some point you can travel to a friends land to see their farms & achievements. It’s definitely a fun game! I got it on sale & imo a fantastic price for as much that has been put into this game. I feel like the other reviews for this game definitely have been a little too harsh imo. The game does start off kind of confusing, but overall well worth the money. Good work to the developers & I can’t wait to see more!!

This is a nice escape from anyone's normal world. Though I wish the graphics were more realistic like other games with nature. I like exploring the different places. The maps are big to explore. One has hidden caves that one leads to a swamp. You find one by climbing up a big hill when exploring. I don't like the ufo in one of the quests. It stalks me, follows me and upsets my peace. Going into night can be annoying and there should be a way to turn it off. 
 If  you get sick of the music I found if you go to settings on your watch just above inventory you can  turn  the repetitive music down to zero and  just have nature sounds. The inventory is weird. I don't know why anyone would want to collect those weird statues and stuff. Trying to put furniture in place is frustrating and tricky. They spin around too fast as it's hard to control. 
 I just like exploring around. I have fibromyalgia and the floating sensation distracts me from my body. I can "hike" in the woods and other landscapes that are difficult for me to do in real life. Though, even if it isn't as realistic it still is nice.
Why don't the campfires light up at night? Like, what's the point then. Also the fireplaces don't have wood in them and also don't light up. Please make that possible. Nighttime is actually pretty bright. It would be nice to collect our fruits and vegetables and put in baskets or bowls. Don't know if that's possible. I will see if it is. 
Im not understanding why I can only  build my homestead in the flat scenes that don't have hills or paths.  Is it possible to have two homesteads without deleting the other? I'd like to have two.

Has the potential to be great, if one of the main controls didn't include clicking the joystick, especially clicking the rotated joystick. People with arthritis beware, this game is not worth the joint pain.
Not worth the money. Played a few times. Didn’t like it. Asked for refund and was denied. Don’t waste your money like I did. I wouldn’t give it s as my stars

Great game. It would also be nice to place a YouTube player inside the game to help enjoy your time as you spend many hours relaxing and playing in the game. 

And also mini games like fishing, axe throwing, butterfly collecting, would also be nice.

I wanted so so so bad to love this game. The premise is literally everything I want. I have over 2000 hours in Stardew Valley, so the idea that I could play something similar in VR was a dream come true. It would have taken so little for me to give it a 5 star review. That being said, this game is unplayable. I question if the devs even play tested it. The controls are the hottest of hot garbage. I had to restart the game 5 times before I was able to successfully get through the tutorial without it bugging out. Sometime when you open up the inventory it teleports you randomly all over the map, which is vomit inducing. Sometimes you can’t add things to the quick slot, which is required to complete the tutorial, which can’t be turned off even if you have completed it. Sometimes you can’t open the inventory. Sometimes you still move around while using the joystick to get to the inventory. The list goes on and on. I was actually relieved when my headset died because I realized I was beating my head against a wall trying to like this game. All I got for my efforts was to end up sweaty, frustrated, and motion sick. Please devs!!! I want to love this game!!!

developer_response.body: We apologize that you had some trouble with the game. We would love it if you could email us at support@morelshomestead.com and explain to us a little bit more in detail about the issues you are having. This would be really helpful to us. There are a lot of options you can try in Settings that you could try changing that could really help your experience. Changing it to use Snap Rotation, Teleportation on both controllers, and adjusting the Walk Speed could all really help with motion sickness. For your troubles with the inventory and teleporting we would suggest going into settings and turning off the option to open the inventory on the hand you teleport with. I believe this should be one of the bottom settings under Controls. This way your inventory can only be opened on the opposite hand you teleport with. Since your inventory or rather radial menu is opened up by pressing your thumbstick down like a button, this could really help with accidental teleporting or opening that menu. For the quick slot, just make sure you Hold Grip down first, then while holding Grip down press the button you binded your item to. Make sure you keep holding Grip so you will be holding the item in your hand when gets added. We hope you will get a chance to give the game another try with some of these suggestions. Emailing us more details about your experience would also be really helpful. We are very passionate about the game, and we want to give the user the best experience possible.

reviews.review_description:
Have only been playing it for a few hours, was literally waiting for it down to the minute, to come out!!
It's extremely tough on your hands/wrists, with the amount of manoeuvring you have to do... But I'm hoping it gets easier as it goes on!?
The potential is great.. I just don't want the detriment on my muscles, to be the same!! 😊

Very relaxing game, first time I almost fell asleep with my headset on…
Maybe things could be a bit more lively with the possibility to choose a more upbeat soundtrack or even play your own music via YouTube like other games.

Graphics are nice 

It's annoying that both joysticks left/right controls are only for turning, I very much prefer to have one for sidewalking and one for snap turning, also the speed of smooth turning is way too slow

After couple hours of gameplay the game starts to feel already a bit too grindy, all you do is walk around the environments looking for fruits and mushrooms to sell at the market, where the highest sells for 10$ (morels) few for 5$, but these are mostly veg you need to cultivate yourself after buying seeds and most other loots are 2$.
To buy a plot to plant 4 seeds you need 500$+300$ for the seeds (you can find them on the ground too sometime tho)

Only thing that kinda motivates you keep walking around are the quests, get a specific amount of something or take a pic of a specific animal, pity that most don't have a reward for completion, you just get to keep the items you foraged

Overall is a nice and fun game game but I'm afraid I'll get bored of it very soon

developer_response.body: We appreciate your feedback and we listened.  We've made multiple changes to the game to improve player economy.  We've also added strafing and improved turn speed options for players.  We hope you'll try out the changes and reconsider.

reviews.review_description:
Couldn't play for long as I got extremely motion sick from this game. I wish there were options to make moving not as harsh. The economy isn't great either and certain things can definitely be stream lined much better.

Played a few other games and this is the only one that made me completely sick to the point I had to lay down for a bit.

I do not recommend unless they fix this.

developer_response.body: Did you try switching your movement methods to teleportation and snap turning? We have both of those options in settings. Switching to those will significantly help with motion sickness. You can email us at support@morelshomestead.com for further assistance.

reviews.review_description: It doesn’t really tell you how to do anything.

The graphics seem a little dated but im ok with that.
The music can get on your nerves after about a hour or so 
The controls need a little tweaks hear and there.
The game play is relaxing. Watching your land transform into your own personal vision.
Money making can a little grindy.

PLEASE GIVE US A SPRINT
Only spent around 10 min playing and had to leave it was so bad.  Then I requested a refund and no go.  Buyer beware

developer_response.body: Would you be able to send us an email to support@morelshomestead.com and let us know what you felt was bad about the game? Our goal is to make the best experience possible we can for the player. Anything you could tell us about your experience would be helpful.

reviews.review_description:
I like this game… If they could have this more SIMS-like … I would love it… I play this about 30min to a hour every other day… Gets a little boring with just walking and farming… I want to be able to cook, build, decorate etc… i know… asking a whole lot from a game… but that’s what I want.

UPDATE: It would be cool if the lamppost lights actually work… What’s the point of putting up lights and it doesn’t turn on???

reviews.review_title: I love it! One of the best games on Q2.

reviews.review_description: I love this game! So relaxing with lots of rewards for incentive.

reviews.review_title: relaxing at time, but can be frustrating
reviews.review_description: would love to see the ability to lock items in place such as the cabin, I accidently move items or return them to inventory. I like the variety in the game with lots to do and challenges to fufil.

developer_response.body: You can lock items by trigger clicking on the object to bring up its item menu. There you will see a lock item button. Once it is locked you can't move it and it will no longer highlight. You can unlock the item by trigger clicking on the object to bring up its item menu again. I hope this helps. You can always reach out to us at support@morelshomestead.com.

reviews.review_description: I love this game,  but wish there was more to buy. If you could buy animals like horses for the barn and chickens. Would feel more real. And change of seasons would be great. I'm hooked on this game, but could have a lot more

This was my first game on my oculus and it was such a great experience!! All the different things you can do and places you could go was unbelievable to be honest. Kept me interested every step of the way. Im quite the outdoorsman so this game really ticked every box for me!

This game checks all the boxes. It’s huge. There are a bunch of Easter eggs. I have quite a few hours into it. So much stuff to unlock. A lot to do. Good buy. Great for anyone into exploring and building a little “base”. Animal crossing-ish. I highly recommend it. Easy to get lost in it for a bit. Great escape.
To be fair I’ve only played this once because I got severe motion sickness from it. It’s not a bad game I just can’t seem to get into it.

Who would have thought hunting mushrooms would be so much fun! Well you also have quests, photography and building to keep you playing for hours! Also has a night mode where things get interesting. Happy hunting!

Money making is painfully slow. You plant tomatoes and sell them at 2 credits each. To make some money you can search for mushrooms which some are 10 credits. To put this into perlective, a new square patch to plant more is 500 credits, and 4 tomato plants in each one.

Quests pay virtually nothing.

Smooth turning is extremely slow making it necessary to set it to snap, which I hate.

The game needs work and the money making needs an overhaul because as it stands you literally can’t make enough to build anything so it’s just a photo taking walking mushroom collecting simulator, nothing more.

Fix these issues and 5 stars.

Update: 
Developer listened and fixed some issues. I would still like quests to pay a lot more and the ability to sell all items in a category at once. Fishing would be a massive bonus! On the right track though guys! Thumbs up!

Worked great for the first few days, and then continually glitched, not saving progress and kicking me out of the game. Glitched to the point I was having to restart my oculus. Eventually lost all progress. Spent more time frustrated than anything which is really unfortunate since those first few days I really liked the game, and it definitely wasn’t cheap..

developer_response.body: We just put out a new update. Hopefully you will be able to give another try and it fixes your issues. If not, would you be able to send us an email to support@morelshomestead.com and give us as much information on these issues as you can? Anything you could tell us would be helpful.

reviews.review_description: Great idea- Poor execution. While the idea of building your own homestead on an island or in the midwestern part of a country sounds fun, you have to have a controller scheme that works. This one doesn’t. Too many bindings on the thumb-sticks. There is no Survival or much of an economy incentive to keep you motivated. It’s almost sandbox “build an island” with really annoying repetitive music and horrid graphics.

reviews.review_title: I know it’s going to be a great game but
reviews.review_description: Grabbing things and sitting things down makes me quit the game every time. I’ll be patient but please address this.

developer_response.body: We are very sorry to hear about the issue you are having with grabbing and placing objects. We put together a little tutorial video about placing objects. If you get a chance to watch it, I think it could be really helpful with placing objects down. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xyt8kbF16EA. We also just put out an update with some fixes. If you are still having issues placing objects you can reach out to us at support@morelshomestead.com.

reviews.review_description: After a busy few days with the stress of everything life throws at me it feels great to get lost in this game!!!!!! Easy to navigate and very addicting. Happy I made this purchase!!!
Better than expected! 4 stars because mushrooms are rare, but definitely worth buying!! The scenery is amazing!!
This game is great, I had some issues at first which were strictly user error but the wonderful people who created the app helped me and now it’s seamless and works great! Fun and relaxing!

reviews.review_title: Great game, needs a few tweaks
reviews.review_description:
I love love this game, it is beautiful and relaxing. The quests are simple, but engaging, just what I am looking for after a long day of work.

The tutorial was limited, but useful, I recommend it. Gardening, the farmers market, the cute animals, all so perfect.

My only complaint is how difficult it is to maneuver objects and get them to go where you want them. I have a house, I bought floor for it and I have been trying for 5 days to get it set down and aligned with the house. Why can't it be a click and place situation? It gets stuck up in mid air, why is that even an option? I have searched in the game for a FAQ page or some sort of tips sheet to help me and cannot find one. 
 I  know this game is relatively new and reading others reviews I can tell the developers are really taking feedback seriously and working hard to make this a superb game. I hope in the next update you can address this.
